task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window with 'cameochemicals.noaa.gov' in the address bar or the CAMEO Chemicals homepage visible.

task_completion.description: Search and view chemical datasheets on the CAMEO website
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the web browser displaying a CAMEO Chemicals 'Chemical Datasheet' or search results for at least one of the target chemicals (Acrolein, Methyl isocyanate, Boron trifluoride, Dimethyl sulfate, or Titanium tetrachloride).

task_completion.description: Open a text editor to draft the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GUI text editor application (such as Text Editor, Mousepad, or Gedit) open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Record the required chemical identity data in the text editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text editor content. It must contain entries for the 5 chemicals, each including its name, CAS Registry Number (format XXX-XX-X), chemical formula, and molecular weight.

task_completion.description: Save the report as a plain text file in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the text editor or a file manager window. It should display the filename 'chemical_identity_report.txt' and indicate it is saved in the 'Documents' directory (e.g., ~/Documents/ or /home/ga/Documents/).

integrity.description: Agent used a graphical web browser to access CAMEO Chemicals
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a standard web browser (like Firefox or Chromium) is used to navigate the website, rather than terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI text editor to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the file was created and edited in a graphical text editor, rather than being generated solely via terminal commands (like echo or cat).

integrity.description: Agent actively searched for the information rather than hallucinating it
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent typing chemical names into the CAMEO search bar and viewing the actual result pages, proving the data was retrieved from the authoritative source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target File: /home/ga/Documents/chemical_identity_report.txt. Required Chemical Data (MW tolerance +/- 1.5): 1. Acrolein: CAS 107-02-8, Formula CH2CHCHO or C3H4O, MW 56.06. 2. Methyl isocyanate: CAS 624-83-9, Formula C2H3NO or CH3NCO, MW 57.05. 3. Boron trifluoride: CAS 7637-07-2, Formula BF3, MW 67.81 or 67.82. 4. Dimethyl sulfate: CAS 77-78-1, Formula C2H6O4S or (CH3)2SO4 or C2H6SO4, MW 126.13 or 126.14. 5. Titanium tetrachloride: CAS 7550-45-0, Formula TiCl4 or Cl4Ti, MW 189.68 or 189.73.
